Greg, I need to compare two apartments, and I cannot decide. Can you help me?
Of course. So, what is the main difference between them?
Apartment A is more affordable and it is in a more peaceful area. But it is smaller, and the trip to the hospital is longer.
And Apartment B? What is the biggest advantage?
It is bigger and more modern, and it is much closer to work. The drawback is that it is more expensive.
Honestly, a short commute is the best option for a busy doctor. I would choose B. But if you prefer peace and quiet, A is the better choice.
This apartment is more affordable than the other one.
The subway is more efficient than the bus.
I think this is the best option for us.
The main drawback is the long trip to work.
I prefer the quieter and more peaceful neighborhood.

I have lived in two very different cities, and people often ask me to compare them. My first city was bigger and more exciting, with more restaurants and a much busier nightlife. It was never boring. But it was also more expensive and a lot more crowded, and the traffic was terrible. My second city is smaller and quieter. Life there is more affordable, the air is cleaner, and my commute is much shorter. Of course, it has fewer options for going out on the weekend. Honestly, the biggest advantage of the small city is the peace. For me, the quieter city is the better place to live now, but the busy city was the more exciting one when I was younger.

Hi Ana Paula, it is Sarah! You asked me to help you choose a gym, so I visited two of them yesterday. The first gym is closer to your apartment and it is more affordable, but it is older and the machines are not as modern. The second gym is bigger and much more modern, with a pool and newer equipment, but it is more expensive and a little farther away. In my opinion, the second one is the best option if you want the pool, but the first one is more convenient for a busy week. They are actually more similar than you think. Call me back and tell me which one you prefer. Bye!

Name the two options you want to compare. Compare their price with a comparative like cheaper or more expensive. Compare another feature, like the size or the location. Say which option is the best and explain why. Say which one you prefer and give your final choice.
